ideation: This animation sequence depicts a person in a manual wheelchair facing right.  The animation will focus on the natural arm movements someone might use to propel the wheelchair. The right arm will be more active, while the left arm provides balance and support.  The sequence will emphasize the cyclical nature of wheelchair propulsion. The animation will avoid overly exaggerated movements to maintain realism.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready to push forward
right arm pushes back, left arm balances
right arm recovers, ready for next push
arms reset, preparing for another cycle
